summary: Validated Priority B end-to-end with backend pytest and frontend Playwright: OpenRouter catalog load/refresh passed, fallback-safe metadata present, Settings catalog controls render, Run Detail shows OpenRouter model picker (346 model names) when provider is enabled, API base normalization works with full-domain frontend env, and existing provider/import/report workflows remain passing.
action_items: Optional: keep backend test URL normalization in all suites so preview-domain env values without /api remain stable in regression runs.
critical_code_review_comments: Previously, backend pytest files resolved full-domain REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL values without appending /api, which can break API regression tests in preview deployments; this was corrected in tests.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ targets/runs/findings through pytest for regression validation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: OpenRouter was temporarily enabled via API for Run Detail picker validation, then restored to disabled/custom/no key. Priority B API and UI checks passed on public preview URL. Latest pytest XML reflects passing suites.
rca of the issue: No product bug reproduced in this iteration. Test-suite RCA: API base handling in older pytest files assumed full-domain env was directly API-rooted; adding /api normalization removed preview-environment false failures.
